revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-010

Radar in which the target is fitted with a transponder (4-3-420) to re-transmit automatically on the same frequency as the interrogating frequency, or a different frequency. The response may be coded or delayed by a known duration (or both) to provide identification, and to allow the range to be measured.

{{IALAFooter}}
